title: Customer Research
description: Research that turns vague market assumptions into sharper positioning, offers, landing pages, campaigns, and sales conversations.
audience: Best for teams that know the product works but cannot yet explain the buying trigger in the customer's language.
promise: You get the words, objections, triggers, and decision criteria your growth system should be built around.
process: Review analytics, calls, CRM notes, reviews, and sales material
Run structured interviews with target customers and lost opportunities
Cluster patterns into pains, triggers, objections, and proof points
Turn findings into messaging, page, and campaign recommendations
